prs_reviewed.title: frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
frontend: deps: Bump yaml from 2.8.3 to 2.9.0
frontend: Add @typescript/native-preview and use it for type checking
feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
frontend: Fix Backstage receiver listener leak on Home remount
frontend: MetadataDisplay: Fix owner ref link when apiVersion mismatch
frontend: App: Remove unused themeName dependency

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter
Do NOT include Fixes #NN, closes #NN auto-close keywords in commit messages
Approval style is warm and brief; maintainer @illume is primary reviewer
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — not human review
Frontend: fix exhaustive-deps violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable
Backend: use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need
Material-UI v5 patterns used throughout frontend
